titleStmt.title: SII 38.285: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 285. (A.R. No. 285 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete. This inscription records that both the sabhā and ūr of Śivankūḍal in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam sold land after receipt of the price-money from the temple (Ādidāsan śaṇḍēśvaradēvar) for conducting festival on seven days commencing from Āṉi-uttiraṭṭāḍi, to the god Mahādēvar Śivakoḻundāṇḍār of the village, (Śivankūḍal), the asterism under which the king (perumāḷ) was born.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravatti śrīvikkiramaco
ḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu jayaṅkoṇ
ṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu nirvaḷurnā
ṭṭuc civankūṭal mahāsabhaiyomum Ivvūrū
(ḷā)romum Eṅkaḷur mahādevar śivakkoḻun=tāṇ
ṭārkku tiruvāni Uttiraṭṭāti perumāḷ tirunakṣattra
m Eḻunāḷum Eḻun=taruḷi nitamum prasāditaruḷukai
nāṅkaḷ Ātitāsanśaṇḍeśvaradevar pakkal
vilaikoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷ
ṇal putteri kiḻpaḷḷattum miṉkālvaḻi nirpāyunilattukku kiḻ
pāṟkellai viḷāttukkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tiruveṅ
kai paḷḷat kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai teṟku nokkip po
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai kiḻakku maṭṭeṟap pona vaḻikku
Digital edition of SII 38.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
